networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
permissionDenied: You don't have permission to do this.

server.BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your input.
server.UNAUTHORIZED: You must be signed in to do this.
server.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
server.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
server.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with the current state.
server.UNPROCESSABLE: The request could not be processed.
server.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
server.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again.
